title: Callitriche berteroana
taxonomy: Callitriche berteroana is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to the Hawaiian Islands and is a member of the genus Callitriche, which is a group of aquatic plants. The genus Callitriche is further classified into several species, with Callitriche berteroana being one of the most notable species. Callitriche berteroana is often found growing in wetlands, ponds, and other aquatic environments. The classification of Callitriche berteroana reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native Hawaiian habitat.
